ground_truth.title: Free Legal Forms | Kansas Legal Services
ground_truth.main_content:
Kansas Legal Services (KLS) provides these easy-to-use, interactive forms as a free service to low-income Kansans. The interviews will ask simple questions and automatically fill out the documents you need for filing or responding to legal actions in Kansas district courts based on your answers.

INTERACTIVE LEGAL FORMS FOR KANSAS DISTRICT COURTS

**CRITICAL WARNING:** It is always wise to talk to a lawyer before proceeding in a court case on your own. Please read our important warning here.

USING THESE FORMS

**WORD PROCESSING PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS:** The interactive court forms download for printing in Rich Text Format (.rtf), which can be opened in any word processing program (e.g., Microsoft Word). Make sure your computer chooses a word processing program to open the documents or you may encounter errors or "gibberish."

**NOTE TO USERS OF CHROME and FIREFOX:** The backspace button does not work to delete or modify answers in these interactive interviews. You must use arrows or your mouse to highlight the information you need to change, then use the delete key to remove letters before you can input new information.

AVAILABLE FORMS BY CATEGORY:

**Family Law / Divorce:** Divorce (no minor children), Divorce (with minor children), Request to Waive Filing Fee, Parenting Plan, Child Support Worksheet

**Child Support / Parenting Time:** Child Support Worksheet, Child Support Worksheet & Domestic Relations Affidavit, Modification of Child Support motion, Parenting Time Instructions

**Address Change:** Change of Address Form

**Name Change:** Affidavit and order for name change, Adult Name Change in Kansas, Request to Waive Filing Fees

**Paternity Action:** Form to File Paternity Action, Reply to Paternity Action, Final Orders in Paternity Action

**Identity Theft:** Letter to Creditor, Credit Report Dispute Letter, Letter to Debt Collector, Answer to Petition

**Code for Care of Children (CINC):** Motion for Interested Party Status, Motion for Court Appointed Attorney, Motion for Substantial Consideration of Grandparent

**Expungement of Records:** Expungement of Criminal Records, Request to Waive Filing Fee

**Guardian / Conservator:** Termination of Adult Guardianship, Guardian's Annual Report, Conservator's Annual Accounting

**Protection Orders:** Kansas Protection Order Portal (KSPOP), Protection from Abuse form, Protection from Stalking or Sexual Assault form

**Small Claims Court:** Petition, summons, defendant's claim, Small Claims Security Deposit Form

**Suspended Driver's License:** Instructions and Packet for Restricted License Eligibility, Request for Restricted License

**General Request to Waive Filing Fees:** If you do not have the funds for the filing fee required for any legal situation, you can use this interactive KLS form to ask the court for a fee waiver.
